title: The Giant's Skeleton
description: Half-buried beneath the earth lies the skeleton of a giant. Its ribcage rises higher than the surrounding trees, and an ancient weapon still rests in its massive hand.

options.title: Explore the Skeleton
options.description: Climb through the giant's remains in search of forgotten treasures.

options.title: Take the Giant's Weapon
options.description: A relic this impressive belongs in your hands, not buried in the dirt.

options.title: Honor the Fallen Giant
options.description: Offer a moment of silence before continuing your journey.
